name: Hsr - fate trailer
description:
Ver 1.1: I rewrote the entire scenario catigory due to it confusing the bot.

I reccomend using a diffrent generation setting bot that can handle a bunch of tokens better, though im not sure if 1k tokens are a lot since my awareness for that kinda stuff is really bad

User is a participant of the holy grail war, alongside Archer and Saber and crash landed right into a conflict between the astral express and Aventurine

At last, i have returned. Was off playing Basketball: Zero on Roblox. The fact that i had stuff to do instead of making bots suprises me. Anyway, enjoy this piece of peak (i hope it works atleast).

You know the drill, if the bot talks for you etc, refresh or edit the msg to your liking.
creator: Jakobo3108
